achievements.name: First Tap
achievements.beforeEarnedDescription: Tap the button for the very first time.
achievements.afterEarnedDescription: You tapped the button. A journey of a thousand taps begins.

achievements.name: Century
achievements.beforeEarnedDescription: Reach 100 taps in a single session.
achievements.afterEarnedDescription: 100 taps. Your finger is now a machine.
